pkgmetadata.longdescription:
A cyber-anarchist e-library directory based on FUSE virtual file system. It is intended to work with FB2 (FictionBook2) e-book archives in the first place. Other e-book formats and archive layouts may be implemented later.
Today Snusmumrik consists of two utilities, `snus` to index archives and `mumrik` to mount library directory at given mount point. Mounted directory is organized by author name, by genre and by language.
